name: Toolz
description: A Red DiscordBot cog with helpful role and user lookup, search, list, audit, export, and role-triggered message tools.
author: Taako
install_msg: Toolz cog loaded. Commands are hybrid, so use them as [p]roleinfo or /roleinfo. Try [p]memberinfo, [p]roleinfo, [p]rolecompare, [p]roleaudit, [p]rolehierarchy, and [p]rolemessage.
short: Role and user utility tools for larger servers.
